# Copper Bay Tech

> Custom websites, IT support, and cybersecurity for small businesses across the U.S. Enterprise-grade thinking without the enterprise price tag — based in Sonoma County, CA.

Copper Bay Tech is an independently owned technology company based in Sonoma County, California, working with small and medium-sized businesses across the United States. We build custom-coded websites, provide managed IT support, and deliver practical cybersecurity and AI integration services — with a real person behind every project. Web design, cybersecurity, and remote IT support are delivered fully remote nationwide; hands-on, on-site service is available throughout the North Bay.

## Services

- [Web Design & Development](https://copperbaytech.com/web-design-sonoma-county): Custom-coded business websites, no templates or page builders. Mobile-first, fast-loading, with local SEO optimization and Google Business Profile setup.
- [IT Support](https://copperbaytech.com/it-support-sonoma-county): Managed IT support, network setup and management, cloud migration, process automation, and AI agent integrations.
- [Cybersecurity](https://copperbaytech.com/cybersecurity-small-business): Security audits and reporting, infrastructure hardening, incident response planning, and compliance baseline (PCI, HIPAA).
- [AI Integration](https://copperbaytech.com/ai-integration-small-business): Practical AI built for local businesses — answers calls 24/7, replies to leads in seconds, books appointments, and handles repetitive busywork.

## Service Areas

Remote nationwide across the United States. On-site service is available throughout Sonoma County and the North Bay, California — including Petaluma, Santa Rosa, Sebastopol, Rohnert Park, Sonoma, Bodega Bay, Cotati, Windsor, and Healdsburg.

## Industries Served

- [Healthcare](https://copperbaytech.com/industries/healthcare): HIPAA-compliant websites and IT for medical and dental practices.
- [Wineries](https://copperbaytech.com/industries/wineries): E-commerce sites, POS integrations, and secure networks for Sonoma County wineries.
- [Restaurants](https://copperbaytech.com/industries/restaurants): Online ordering, reservations, and IT infrastructure for food & beverage businesses.
- [Law Firms](https://copperbaytech.com/industries/law-firms): Secure, compliant websites and IT for legal practices.
- [Real Estate](https://copperbaytech.com/industries/real-estate): Property listing sites and CRM integrations for real estate professionals.

## Free Tools & Resources

- [Free Website Audit](https://copperbaytech.com/audit): Instantly check speed, SSL, SEO health, broken links, and mobile readiness.
- [IT Health Check](https://copperbaytech.com/it-health-check): A short quiz that identifies IT risks in your small business.
- [Missed Call Calculator](https://copperbaytech.com/tools/missed-call-calculator): Estimate what unanswered calls are costing your business.
- [Blog](https://copperbaytech.com/blog): Practical IT and web design guides for Sonoma County business owners.
- [Pricing](https://copperbaytech.com/pricing): Transparent, flat-fee pricing for web, IT, and security services.
